revision.text:
[[ja:日置神社 (高島市)]] {{Expand Japanese|日置神社 (高島市)}} {{Infobox religious building | name = Hioki Shrine (Q11510250) | native_name = 日置神社 (高島市) | image = T-hioki-jinja.JPG | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Hioki Shrine (Q11510250) | coordinates = {{coord|35.4325|136.009833}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] }} {{nihongo|'''Hioki Shrine'''|日置神社 (高島市)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Ōmi Province]]. == instance of (P31) == * {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो मंदिर|hr|Šintoistički hram|hu|Sintó szentély|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|神社|ka|ძინძია|ko|신사 (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần xã|wuu|神社|zh_yue|神社|zh|神社|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} * {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}} * {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|en|Shikinai Shosha|ja|式内小社|simple|Shikinai Shosha|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}} * {{ill|Q135160342|ltq=Q135160342|qid=Q135160342|1=Kokuhei-sha}} * {{ill|Q135038714|ltq=Q135038714|qid=Q135038714|1=Disputed Shikinaisha or Shikigeisha}} * {{ill|Q135419779|ltq=Q135419779|qid=Q135419779|1=Shikinai Supershrine}} == part of (P361) == * {{ill|Q11638477|ltq=Q11638477|qid=Q11638477|1=List of Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province}} ** Series ordinal: 124 ** P155: {{ill|Tomoyuhino Shrine|lt=Tomoyuhino Shrine|qid=Q135039880|1=Tomoyuhino Shrine}} ** P156: {{ill|Tsunono Shrine|lt=Tsunono Shrine|qid=Q135039881|1=Tsunono Shrine}} == located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) == * {{ill|Q845794|ltq=Q845794|qid=Q845794|1=Takashima, Shiga}} * {{ill|Ōmi Province|lt=Ōmi Province|ca|Província d'Ōmi|ckb|پارێزگای ئۆمی|cs|Provincie Ómi|de|Provinz Ōmi|en|Ōmi Province|es|Provincia de Ōmi|fa|ولایت اومی|fi|Ōmin provinssi|fr|Province d'Ōmi|gl|Provincia de Ōmi|hak|Ōmi-koet|id|Provinsi Ōmi|it|Ōmi|ja|近江国|ko|오미국|lt|Omio žemė|nl|Omi (provincie)|pl|Prowincja Ōmi|pt|Província de Ōmi|ru|Оми (провинция)|simple|Ōmi Province|sk|Ómi (provincia)|sr|Провинција Оми|tr|Ōmi (vilayet)|uk|Провінція Омі|vi|Tỉnh Ōmi|zh_min_nan|Ômi-kok|zh_yue|近江國|zh|近江國|qid=Q843882|1=Ōmi Province}} * {{ill|Q11669692|ltq=Q11669692|qid=Q11669692|1=Takashima District, Shiga}} == coordinate location (P625) == * ᥓᥣᥱ ᥙᥣᥢᥱ|tet|Japaun|te|జపాన్|tg|Ҷопон|th|ประเทศญี่ปุ่น|thnews|หมวดหมู่:ประเทศญี่ปุ่น|tig|ጃፓን|ti|ጃፓን|tk|Ýaponiýa|tl|Hapon|tly|Japonijə|tn|Japan|tok|ma Nijon|to|Siapani|tpi|Siapan|trv|Tanah Tunux|tr|Japonya|trnews|Kategori:Japonya|trquote|Japonya|trvoyage|Japonya|ts|Japani|tt|Япония|tum|Japan|tw|Japan|tyv|Япония|ty|Tāpōnē|udm|Япония|ug|ياپونىيە|uk|Японія|uknews|Категорія:Японія|ukquote|Японія|ukvoyage|Японія|ur|جاپان|uz|Yaponiya|vec|Japon|vep|Japonii|ve|Japan|vi|Nhật Bản|vibooks|Các quốc gia/Nhật Bản|vivoyage|Nhật Bản|vls|Japan|vo|Yapän|war|Hapon|wa|Djapon|wo|Sapoŋ|wuu|日本|xal|Ниxуудин Нутг|xh|IJapani|xmf|იაპონია|yi|יאפאן|yo|Japan|za|Nyiedbonj|zea|Japan|zgh|ⵏⵉⴱⵓⵏ|zh_classical|日本|zh_min_nan|Ji̍t-pún|zh_yue|日本|zh|日本|zhnews|Category:日本|zhquote|日本|zhvoyage|日本|zu|IJaphani|qid=Q17|1=Japan}} == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 3160005007815 == has part(s) (P527) == * {{ill|Sakanami Shrine|lt=Sakanami Shrine|qid=Q135193765|1=Sakanami Shrine}} ** P1352: {'amount': '+2', 'unit': '1'} ** P3831: {{ill|Q135022904|ltq=Q135022904|qid=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}} * {{ill|Q135193764|ltq=Q135193764|qid=Q135193764|1=Hioki Shrine}}Kokugakuin University Shrine database ** P1352: {'amount': '+1', 'unit': '1'} ** P3831: {{ill|Q135022904|ltq=Q135022904|qid=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}} == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '滋賀県高島市今津町酒波855', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:日置神社 (高島市)]] {{wikidata link|Q11510250}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称 = Hioki Shrine |画像 = [[ファイル:T-hioki-jinja.JPG|270px]]
Worship hall |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|qid=Q131358|1=Shiga Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Takashima, Shiga|Q845794|qid=Q845794|1=Takashima, Shiga}} Imazu-chō Sanami 855 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|35|25|57.0|N|136|00|35.4|E|display=ti}} |祭神 = {{ill|lt=Susanoo|Q272993|qid=Q272993|lt=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto}}
Hioki Sukune-no-Mikoto |社格 = Candidate {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}} / former {{ill|lt=Gōsha|Q134917316|qid=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}} |創建 = Reign of {{ill|lt=Emperor Suinin|Q314850|qid=Q314850|1=Emperor Suinin}} |本殿 = {{ill|lt=nagare-zukuri|Q210684|qid=Q210684|lt=three-bay nagare-zukuri|1=Nagare-zukuri}} |別名 = Iwatsurugi Ōkami |札所等 = |例祭 = {{ill|lt=April 18|Q2521|qid=Q2521|1=April 18}} |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Shiga|label=Hioki Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=250}} }} '''Hioki Shrine''' (ひおきじんじゃ) is a shrine in Sanami, Imazu-chō, {{ill|lt=Takashima, Shiga|Q845794|qid=Q845794|1=Takashima, Shiga}}, {{ill|lt=Shiga Prefecture|Q131358|qid=Q131358|1=Shiga Prefecture}}. It is a candidate {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}} {{ill|lt=ronsha|Q135022904|qid=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}}, and its {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=former shrine rank|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines|qid=Q712534}} was {{ill|lt=Gōsha|Q134917316|qid=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}}. === Enshrined deities === * {{ill|lt=Susanoo|Q272993|qid=Q272993|lt=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto}} * {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Hioki Sukune-no-Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}} === Shrine crest === * Sixteen-petal chrysanthemum === History === In ancient times it was called Sanami Iwatsurugi Daibosatsu. It is the sōsha of Kawakami-go. In {{ill|lt=1876|Q7766|qid=Q7766|1=1876}} (Meiji 9), it was ranked as a gōsha. === Shrine family === The priestly office has been inherited hereditarily by the Furumiya family. === Festivals === * Annual festival (Kawakami Festival): April 18 === Cultural properties, etc. === * Five-ring stone pagoda - called the Regent Yorimichi Pagoda. Height: 8 shaku. === Nearby === * {{ill|lt=Sanami-dera|Q11644336|qid=Q11644336|1=Sanami-ji Temple}} * Umehara Hiyoshi Shrine * {{ill|lt=Yuge Shrine (Takashima)|Q11487078|qid=Q11487078|lt=Yuge Shrine|1=Yuge Shrine (Takashima)}} * Imazu General Sports Park === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === *[http://www.shiga-jinjacho.jp/ycBBS/Board.cgi/02_jinja_db/db/ycDB_02jinja-pc-detail.html?mode:view=1&view:oid=1338 日置神社]（滋賀県神社庁） {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Hioki Shrine (Q11510250)]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Hioki Shrine (Q11510250)]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Hioki Shrine (Q11510250)]][[Category:Disputed Shikinaisha or Shikigeisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Takashima, Shiga]] [[Category:近江国の式内社]] [[Category:滋賀県の旧郷社]]
